detectors.description:

[MUSKSWAP.sendETHToFee(uint256)](MUSKSWAP.sol#L815-L819) sends eth to arbitrary user

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MUSKSWAP._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MUSKSWAP.sol#667-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (MUSKSWAP.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MUSKSWAP.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MUSKSWAP.sol#735)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (MUSKSWAP.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MUSKSWAP.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MUSKSWAP.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MUSKSWAP.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MUSKSWAP.sol#933)
	MUSKSWAP._rOwned (MUSKSWAP.sol#349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MUSKSWAP._takeTeam(uint256) (MUSKSWAP.sol#945-953)
	- MUSKSWAP._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MUSKSWAP.sol#905-941)
	- MUSKSWAP.balanceOf(address) (MUSKSWAP.sol#493-497)
	- MUSKSWAP.constructor() (MUSKSWAP.sol#431-457)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MUSKSWAP.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MUSKSWAP.sol#959)
	MUSKSWAP._rTotal (MUSKSWAP.sol#361) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MUSKSWAP._getCurrentSupply() (MUSKSWAP.sol#1101-1111)
	- MUSKSWAP._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MUSKSWAP.sol#957-963)
	- MUSKSWAP.constructor() (MUSKSWAP.sol#431-457)
	- MUSKSWAP.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MUSKSWAP.sol#589-611)
